title: paramignya mindanaensis
intro: Paramignya mindanaensis, also known as the Mindanao box fruit or Paramignya, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It has been traditionally used in Filipino medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Paramignya mindanaensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its extracts have been studied for their potential to develop new medicines and health supplements.
